svg.text: HA routing peers - spread across nodes

text.font-family: ui-sans-serif, system-ui, -apple-system, 'Segoe UI', Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: One routing peer per node - spread best-effort by default, guaranteed with topologySpreadConstraints.

svg.text: A node failure loses only one routing peer; clients fail over to the survivors.

svg.text: The PodDisruptionBudget (maxUnavailable: 1) keeps node drains to one peer at a time.
